title: Starchef Silicone Slotted Turner Spatula Heat Resistant Non-Stick Soft Grip, Stainless Steel(Grey)
features: LIFETIME GUARANTEE-Any of our Starchef’s product comes with a lifetime Guarantee.You can barely get this lifetime guarantee from another brands.Risk free buying!

HEAT RESISTANT-Unlike some cheap nylon turners,our turner is made of hygienic food grade silicone material which can undertake higher temperature up to 446ºF/230°C.No need to worrying about melting when cooking any more!
SILICONE HEAD TO PROTECT YOUR PAN-If you like using non-stick pan,this is a great helper to you.It is noiseless when cooking and won’t scratch your pan at all.
ENOUGH TOUGHNESS-Unlike some cheap turners,this slotted turner is touch enough,no matter the head or the handle.No more worrying about sauce splashing or handle snapping.
EASY TO CLEAN AND STORE-Unlike steel or wooden scraper,silicone scraper is quite easy to clean after scraping cream,butter,jam and so on.The hole at the end is for easy hanging storage.
description: Product Description Howdy!Welcome to Starchef mall~Now please slow down your step and take a round here. Starchef Silicone Slotted Turner Series We hereby specially offer you this new concept silicone slotted turner,which combines silicone and stainless steel material.In the meanwhile,it is with attractive exterior and full of utility. Grey Silicone Slotted Turner This slotted turner is specially designed for non-stick cookware which is made of stainless steel and silicone material. Are you kidding me??? From the picture,we can see that the connecting rod deforms seriously after 0.5kg sand bag is tied up to the head,which is too soft for cooking and scooping. With Appropriate Toughness From the picture,we can hardly see the deformation after 0.5kg sand bag is tied up to the silicone turner head.The silicone head is neither too soft nor too stiff,which is quite suitable for cooking and scooping. Reliable and Durable We can clearly see from the picture that Starchef slotted turner is Tougher!More comfortable!More Durable! Specially Designed Head Our turner head uses slanting design as long as 11mm which makes it much easier to scoop up the food. Silicone Case and One-piece Stainless Steel We specially cover one silicone case at the end which tightly sticks with the handle.It makes the handle anti-slip and anti-scalded.Besides,we use one-piece stainless steel design to avoid snapping.
